heroPromise.subtext: Centuries of Italian tradition brought to the heart of Croatia. Experience a masterpiece in grooming.

philosophy.title: Tradition
philosophy.desc: Operating with the same techniques used in Seville for over 100 years.

philosophy.title: Family
philosophy.desc: A barbershop that treats every customer like family. We remember your name and your cut.

philosophy.title: Precision
philosophy.desc: Using only the finest Italian grooming tools and imported essences.

stylists.name: Luigi Barber
stylists.bio: 4th generation master barber from the Amalfi coast.

reviews.name: Antun P.
reviews.text: The only place I trust for my beard. Luigi is a true artist.
